faqs.question: How much does centipede control cost in Kew Gardens Hills?
faqs.answer: Our centipede control services in Kew Gardens Hills range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment approach needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why do I have centipedes in my Kew Gardens Hills home?
faqs.answer: Centipedes are attracted to moisture and often enter Kew Gardens Hills homes through cracks in foundations, basement windows, and gaps around doors. They're commonly found in bathrooms, basements, and crawl spaces where humidity is high, feeding on other small insects already present in your home.

faqs.question: Are centipedes in Kew Gardens Hills dangerous?
faqs.answer: While centipedes can bite if handled, they're generally not dangerous to humans. However, their presence often indicates other pest problems or excess moisture issues. House centipedes can be alarming due to their appearance and speed, making professional removal a priority for most homeowners.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate centipedes from my Kew Gardens Hills property?
faqs.answer: Most centipede infestations in Kew Gardens Hills can be controlled within 1-2 treatments. Our technicians will conduct a thorough inspection, apply targeted treatments to entry points and hiding areas, and address moisture issues. Follow-up visits ensure complete elimination and long-term prevention.
